rules.rule_text:
rule ZinFoq
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects ZinFoq implant"
		author = "RussianPanda"
		date = "2025-12-8"
		hash = "0f0f9c339fcc267ec3d560c7168c56f607232cbeb158cb02a0818720a54e72ce"

	strings:
		$s1 = "_FlAg_UuId;;;;;;"
		$s2 = "interactive_shell"
		$s3 = "explorer_download"

	condition:
		uint32( 0 ) == 0x464c457f and all of them
}
